title: zeh #2088
definition:
1) this, this one, here, which, this...that, the one...the other,
    another, such
    1a) (alone)
        1a1) this one
        1a2) this...that, the one...the other, another
    1b) (appos to subst)
        1b1) this
    1c) (as predicate)
        1c1) this, such
    1d) (enclitically)
        1d1) then
        1d2) who, whom
        1d3) how now, what now
        1d4) what now
        1d5) wherefore now
        1d6) behold here
        1d7) just now
        1d8) now, now already
    1e) (poetry)
        1e1) wherein, which, those who
    1f) (with prefixes)
        1f1) in this (place) here, then
        1f2) on these conditions, herewith, thus provided, by, through
             this, for this cause, in this matter
        1f3) thus and thus
        1f4) as follows, things such as these, accordingly, to that
             effect, in like manner, thus and thus
        1f5) from here, hence, on one side...on the other side
        1f6) on this account
        1f7) in spite of this, which, whence, how
